g.title: Flowchart
g.text: Dynamic Path Planning Based on Improved Ant Colony Algorithm (PSO–ACO Hybrid, Road Condition Factor R)

g.title: pso
g.text: Use R(0) in PSO fitness (replace distance)
Tune ACO parameters: α, β, ρ

g.title: aco_init
g.text: Run improved ACO with tuned (α, β, ρ)

g.title: note_pso
g.text: PSO runs once to tune (α, β, ρ).

g.title: newtour
g.text: Re-plan from current node using improved ACO
